name: L.A. Savory Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the biscuit batter according to package directions for muffins.
2. Prepare the corn bread batter according to package directions.
3. Mix together the prepared batters and pour into 2 separate 8-inch square baking pans.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the bread tests done in the center and is lightly browned.
